caption: A man with short, dark hair and a trimmed beard is recorded in a studio setting against a backdrop of dark, vertically ribbed acoustic foam panels. He wears over-ear black headphones and a dark jacket over a grey shirt. He is positioned in front of a professional silver condenser microphone held by a black shock mount and boom arm. As the sequence progresses, the man speaks and shifts his gaze and facial expressions. He initially looks forward and slightly to the left, then shifts his eyes further to the left while gesturing with his right hand. In the final moments, he briefly closes his eyes and tilts his head slightly back while continuing to speak into the microphone. No text or logos are visible in the scene.
